headline: Kuebix by FreightWise Named FedEx Compatible Community Tier Partner for 2026
summary: FreightWise is proud to announce that Kuebix by FreightWise has been recognized as a FedEx Compatible Community Tier partner for 2026. This certification reflects Kuebix's excellence within the transportation management category, underscoring its commitment to delivering seamless, multi-carrier solutions that help businesses of all sizes simplify shipping and optimize logistics.
